cards.front: What is data preparation in pandas?
cards.back: Data preparation involves cleaning, transforming, and normalizing data to prepare it for analysis.
Concatenating in pandas involves combining two or more dataframes into a single dataframe.
Transformation in pandas involves changing the data type or structure of the data, such as converting categorical variables to numerical variables.
Discretization in pandas involves dividing continuous data into discrete categories or bins.
Permutation in pandas involves randomly rearranging the rows or columns of a dataframe.
